title: pv-addon-flashback
description: Compatibility add-on for Plasmo Voice and Flashback that allows you to record voice chat with Flashback.
body:
![pv-addon-flashback](https://i.imgur.com/8V1GM18.png)
Plasmo Voice | Modrinth | Discord | Patreon
# pv-addon-flashback Compatibility add-on for [Plasmo Voice](https://modrinth.com/plugin/plasmo-voice) and [Flashback](https://modrinth.com/mod/flashback) mod. With this add-on Plasmo Voice will be recorded in Flashback replays. ## Installation 1. Install [Plasmo Voice](https://modrinth.com/plugin/plasmo-voice) and [Flashback](https://modrinth.com/mod/flashback) 1. Download the add-on from [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/pv-addon-flashback/) 1. Drop it into the `~/mods` folder
